title: D-Mail Frontmatter v1
description: Schema for D-Mail file YAML frontmatter. Defines the wire format contract between D-Mail producing and consuming tools in the phonewave ecosystem.

dmail-schema-version.description: Schema version identifier. Required for all D-Mails.

name.description: Unique identifier for this D-Mail. Used as the filename stem (e.g. 'spec-auth-w1' -> 'spec-auth-w1.md').

kind.description: D-Mail type. Determines routing via phonewave SKILL.md produces/consumes declarations.

description.description: Human-readable summary of the D-Mail content.

issues.description: Related issue identifiers (e.g. 'MY-123'). Used by consuming tools to correlate D-Mails with tracked work.

severity.description: Message severity. 'high' triggers receive-gate approval flows (Notifier/Approver) at consuming tools.

targets.description: Target identifiers for convergence detection. Used by convergence kind D-Mails to indicate which targets are converging.

metadata.description: Arbitrary string key-value pairs for tool-specific extensions (e.g. 'created_at', 'convergence_for').
